stories.title: Create and complete todos
stories.acMarkdown:
### AC-1: Add a todo
**Given** the user is on the main list view
**When** they type 'Buy milk' into the input and press Enter
**Then** a new todo 'Buy milk' appears at the top of the list with status open

### AC-2: Complete a todo
**Given** an open todo exists
**When** the user clicks its checkbox
**Then** the todo is struck through and moves to the Completed section

stories.title: Filter by list
stories.acMarkdown:
### AC-1: Filter todos by list
**Given** todos exist in both the Work and Home lists
**When** the user selects the Work list in the sidebar
**Then** only Work todos are shown and the header reads 'Work'
